quickActions.title: Créer automatisation
quickActions.description: Ouvre la vue Automatisations sur le panneau de création.

tools.name: automation.schedule_task
tools.label: Schedule automation task
tools.description: Create or update an automation rule that schedules a recurring or event-driven task for the user.
tools.promptSnippet: Program a user automation task by creating an automation rule.
promptGuidelines: Use this tool when the user asks to program, schedule, or automate a recurring task.
Always provide a clear human-readable rule name and the task instruction to run.

trigger.description: Trigger topic, e.g. conversation.created or conversation.message.received.

modelKey.description: Optional provider/model key to store with the task.

tools.name: automation.list_scheduled_tasks
tools.label: List scheduled automation tasks
tools.description: List existing automation rules so the LLM can inspect already programmed tasks before creating or updating one.
